ComponentType: High-Side Power Switch / Load Switch with Integrated MOSFET
Description: The RT9742 is a low-voltage, single N-MOSFET high-side power switch IC designed primarily for USB power management. It functions as a digitally controlled switch between a power supply (2.7V to 6V) and a load, integrating protection features including over-current, short-circuit, and thermal shutdown with foldback. It includes a fault flag output (FLG) to signal issues to a host controller and features an embedded delay to prevent false triggering from inrush currents.

KeyParameters.Protection Features: Over-Current Protection (OCP), Short-Circuit Protection, Thermal Shutdown with Foldback, Under-Voltage Lockout (UVLO)
KeyParameters.Control Logic: Enable (EN) pin with Active-High or Active-Low variants (part-dependent)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Logic input to enable/disable the power switch. Polarity is variant-dependent (Active High or Active Low).
Open-drain output. Pulls low to indicate a fault condition (over-current, thermal shutdown, UVLO).
